issues.title: Sync issues
issues.discardConfirm: Discard this record? It will not be synced.

reasons.validation: Some fields are invalid. Edit and try again.
reasons.not_found: A related record (worker, rate, parcel, cycle…) was not found.
reasons.read_only: Your organization's billing is past due — mutations are paused.
reasons.feature_not_in_plan: This feature is not included in your plan.
reasons.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.

pendingNote: Saved on this device; will sync when back online.
saveError: Could not save the record. Check the fields and try again.
